---
name: Release Tracking
about: Coordinate beta, rc, and final release progression
labels: [release-tracking]
---

## Trigger

<!-- Required. One of:
     - "Human instruction: <quote or reference>"
     - "Orchestrator: pre-agreed condition met — <describe condition>"
  Do not open this issue without a valid trigger recorded here. -->

-

## Trigger source

- [ ] Human explicit instruction
- [ ] Orchestrator (pre-agreed condition met, basis recorded above)

## Proposed version

<!-- Proposed version string, e.g. 0.2.0 -->

-

## Version scale

<!-- Determined by Spec recommendation, confirmed by Orchestrator.
     If Spec and Orchestrator differ, Orchestrator records the rationale here. -->

- [ ] major
- [ ] minor
- [ ] patch

## Scope basis

<!-- What is included in this release. Reference merged PRs, issues, or SPEC.md sections. -->

-

## Spec scope summary

<!-- Written by Spec after scope-review step. -->

-

## Planned iteration

- [ ] beta1
- [ ] betaN (additional iterations)
- [ ] rc1
- [ ] rcN (additional iterations)
- [ ] final

## QA release findings

<!-- Written by QA after release testing. -->

-

## Security release findings

<!-- Written by Security after release testing. -->

-

## Triage outcome

<!-- Written by Orchestrator after triage step. Records accepted / deferred / out-of-scope decisions. -->

-

## Human final approval

<!-- Release Manager must request explicit approval here before publishing final.
     Silence is not approval. -->

- [ ] Approval requested
- [ ] Human approved (quote or reference approval here)

## Blocking issues

-

## Next action

-
